parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)
parts.spec: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)

parts.label: Solar Panel x 4 (deploy)

parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4
parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

parts.label: CDH Avionics Stack

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to aluminum frame.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks and thermal coatings.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity under load.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough structural integrity testing and consider composite reinforcement.

risk.desc: Deployment mechanism may face mechanical resistance.
risk.mit: Test the deployment mechanism extensively and refine the rail guide design.

risk.desc: Electrical connectivity issues during deployment.
risk.mit: Ensure proper insulation and conduct electrical connectivity checks.

risk.desc: Service access panels may interfere with internal components.
risk.mit: Optimize panel placement and ensure clearances between panels and components.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)
physics_paths: Load Path: Structural loads from solar panels and antennas are transferred through the frame.
Flow Path: Electrical signals from onboard sensors travel through the PC/104 stack.
Thermal Path: Heat generated by electronics dissipates through the aluminum frame.
Motion Path: Rail guides allow for the deployment of external components.
Pressure Path: The frame maintains a sealed environment for electronic components.
Human/Service Access Path: Service access panels provide entry for maintenance and upgrades.
integration_opportunities: Enhanced thermal management through additional heat sinks.
Increased structural integrity with composite reinforcement.
Improved deployability with spring-loaded rail guides.
